name: Stove Kraft Limited
summary: Stove Kraft Limited engages in manufacturing and trading of kitchen and home appliances primarily under the Pigeon and Gilma brands. It offers pressure cookers, non-stick cookware, hobs, stainless steel cooktops, gas and induction cooktops, LPG and wick stoves, mixer grinders, chimneys, emergency lamps, ladders and cloth dryers, water bottles and flasks, cleaning and garment care products, and cooking appliances. The company also provides chairs, digital safes, microwave OTG, and ovens; and bulb, batten, and downlight LED lights. It operates in India, the Middle East, Kenya, Uganda, Qatar, Sri Lanka, Fiji, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, and Tanzania. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
